stem: A tech company hosts a series of three webinars. 1,500 people attended the first webinar. 64% of the people who attended the first webinar attended the second webinar, and 25% of the people who attended the first and second webinars attended the third webinar. How many people attended all three webinars?
rationale: The correct answer is 240. Since 1,500 people attended the first webinar and 64% of them attended the second, the number who attended the first and second webinars equals 0.64 × 1,500 = 960. Then 25% of those 960 attended the third webinar, so 0.25 × 960 = 240 people attended all three webinars.
